case_title: MIKE TRENARY VS. PRISTINE SUN FUND 1 LLC,

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRENARY, MIKE AS TO DEFENDANT PRISTINE SUN FUND 1 LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
